name: @shogo/shogo-ide
description: Phase 1 spike workspace for the Shogo Code - OSS desktop IDE distribution.

scripts.extension:build: bun run --cwd extensions/shogo-core build && bun run --cwd extensions/shogo-agent-chat build
scripts.extension:typecheck: bun run --cwd extensions/shogo-core typecheck && bun run --cwd extensions/shogo-agent-chat typecheck
